sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 88:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 88:1
items.html: Because the lower seven come out from the incorporation of the bottom Hey, called dot, the seven dots are in the shape of Yods. (Inner Light, Item 48)
